title: Sonic HUD
description: Sonic-themed HUD for all of you hedgehog fans!
body:
A Sonic-themed HUD for anyone who likes Sonic! Almost every HUD icon is animated on 1.20.2+, each representing something from the first game! the mount HUD icon didn't get new sprites, I just didn't know what to put there. Enjoy!

Recommended with RedPierre's [Genesis Flowers](https://www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/genesis-flowers/).

![Animated Showcase](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/sj0812wx/images/654ab78542d82a2459e01d7850851140fbe19808.gif)
